raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2000 will prohibit street racing and sideshows from occurring in parking lots across California.",
    "Street racing and illegal sideshows continue to cause injuries and fatalities across California.",
    "The California Highway Patrol responded to more than 25,000 calls involving illegal street racing activity statewide in 2020.",
    "This number represents an alarming increase of more than 3,500 calls from the year before.",
    "Driver’s license suspensions have been identified as an effective tool for deterring illegal street racing activity.",
    "AB 2000 allows courts to issue a driver’s license suspension for the exhibition of motor vehicle speed during a sideshow in a parking lot."
  ]
}
```
